checks.reason: The node is scoped to Early Dynastic Sumerian organized warfare evidence from the mid-third millennium BCE.
Iron working must not be reintroduced as a prerequisite for Bronze Age Sumerian organized warfare evidence.
Sumerian city-states are enabling context for the source-attested case, not a universal hard prerequisite for warfare.
Warfare is one use context for wound care, not a direct prerequisite.
Watchtowers can arise from settlement security and signaling needs without organized warfare as a direct prerequisite.
Sling projectiles can be hunting or guarding technology as well as warfare equipment.
